name: Alif
makhraj_desc: Alif extends as an open air sound from the mouth cavity (jawf)

name: Ba
makhraj_desc: Both lips pressed firmly together, then released

name: Ta
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue touches the upper front teeth (inside)

name: Tha
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue gently placed between upper and lower teeth

name: Jeem
makhraj_desc: Middle of tongue pressed against the middle of the palate

name: Ha
makhraj_desc: Produced from the middle of the throat with airflow friction

name: Kha
makhraj_desc: Produced from the top/end of the throat — velar friction

name: Dal
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue touches the upper front teeth base

name: Thal
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue placed between upper and lower teeth

name: Ra
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue near upper gum, slight trill/vibration

name: Zay
makhraj_desc: Tongue tip near lower teeth, airflow between teeth — voiced

name: Seen
makhraj_desc: Tongue tip near lower teeth, airflow between teeth — unvoiced

name: Sheen
makhraj_desc: Middle of tongue raised toward the middle of the palate

name: Sad
makhraj_desc: Emphatic: tongue tip at lower teeth with back of tongue raised

name: Dad
makhraj_desc: Side/edge of tongue touches the upper back molars — unique to Arabic

name: Taa
makhraj_desc: Emphatic: tongue tip at upper teeth base, back of tongue raised

name: Dhaa
makhraj_desc: Emphatic: tongue tip between teeth with back of tongue raised

name: Ain
makhraj_desc: Produced from the middle of the throat — compressed, voiced

name: Ghain
makhraj_desc: Upper throat / soft palate — uvular voiced fricative

name: Fa
makhraj_desc: Inner edge of lower lip touches the edges of upper front teeth

name: Qaf
makhraj_desc: Very back of tongue meets the soft palate (uvula area)

name: Kaf
makhraj_desc: Back of tongue meets the soft palate — slightly forward of ق

name: Lam
makhraj_desc: Tip and sides of tongue touch the upper gum and palate edges

name: Meem
makhraj_desc: Both lips closed together — nasal sound escapes through the nose

name: Noon
makhraj_desc: Tip of tongue at upper gum, nasal air released through nose

name: Ha
makhraj_desc: From the deepest part of the throat — light open-air breath

name: Waw
makhraj_desc: Lips rounded and slightly open — bilabial with air flowing through

name: Ya
makhraj_desc: Middle of tongue raised toward the hard palate — palatal glide
